part.text: Stack: Vite + React 19 + TS + lucide-react installed. Ponytail: single-file App in `main.tsx`, plain CSS in `style.css`. No router, no extra deps, no components folder.

input.content:
import { createRoot } from "react-dom/client"; import type { FormEvent } from "react"; import { CalendarCheck, FileText, IdCard, House, HeartPulse, Car, GraduationCap, ShieldCheck, Accessibility, Phone, Mail, MapPin, Clock, } from "lucide-react"; import "./style.css"; const services = [ { icon: IdCard, title: "IDs & records", desc: "Renew an ID, replace a lost card, or request a vital record such as a birth or marriage certificate.", }, { icon: House, title: "Property & housing", desc: "Property tax payments, permits, and housing records for residents and owners.", }, { icon: Car, title: "Vehicles & parking", desc: "Vehicle registration, parking permits, and residential permit renewals.", }, { icon: HeartPulse, title: "Health & social services", desc: "Public health clinics, benefits intake, and family support appointments.", }, { icon: GraduationCap, title: "Education & family", desc: "School enrollment help, library cards, and youth program registration.", }, { icon: FileText, title: "Permits & licenses", desc: "Business licenses, event permits, and notary services by appointment.", }, ]; const commitments = [ { icon: Accessibility, title: "Works with assistive tech", desc: "Pages are built to meet WCAG 2.1 AA. Every control can be reached and used with a keyboard.", }, { icon: ShieldCheck, title: "Your data stays private", desc: "We collect only what is needed to book your visit. We never sell your information.", }, { icon: Phone, title: "Help by phone or in person", desc: "Prefer not to book online? Our staff will assist you by phone or at any service counter.", }, ]; function Header() { return (
Skip to main content
Civic Slot Your city, on your schedule
Services Availability Accessibility Contact
Book a slot
); } function Hero() { return (

A free public service

Book your visit to a local government office — without the wait.

Civic Slot shows open appointment times for city and county offices in one place. Pick a service, choose a time, and arrive prepared.

Find a time See what you can book
  • Most visits take 15 minutes or less
  • Choose the office nearest you
  • No account required to browse
); } function Services() { return (

What you can book

Common services offered by participating offices. Times and availability vary by location.

    {services.map((s) => { const Icon = s.icon; return (

  • {s.title}

    {s.desc}

    • ); })}
); } function Availability() { return (

How availability works

Each office publishes its own open times. We show them side by side so you can compare without calling around.

  1. Offices release slots in advance. Most open bookings two to four weeks ahead. New times usually appear early in the morning.
  2. Times fill on a first-come basis. If a slot is gone, it is gone. We do not hold or reserve times.
  3. Plans change. Cancel any booking at least 24 hours ahead so another resident can use it.
  4. Walk-ins welcome where shown. Some offices keep a limited number of same-day spots. Appointments always save time.

Good to know

  • Online booking is free for residents.
  • Bring a valid ID and any paperwork listed for your service.
  • Arrive within 10 minutes of your start time.
  • Need an interpreter or other help? Tell us when you book — at no cost.
); } function Accessibility() { return (

Our accessibility commitment

Public services should be usable by everyone. Here is what we promise and how to reach us if something gets in your way.

    {commitments.map((c) => { const Icon = c.icon; return (

  • {c.title}

    {c.desc}

    • ); })}
); } function BookingForm() { function onSubmit(e: FormEvent) { e.preventDefault(); const data = new FormData(e.currentTarget); const name = String(data.get("name") || "").trim(); const msg = document.getElementById("book-status"); if (msg) { msg.textContent = name ? `Thanks, ${name}. Review the next open times below to confirm your visit.` : "Thanks. Review the next open times below to confirm your visit."; } } return (

Find a time

Tell us what you need and where. We will show the soonest open slots.

Choose the closest match. You can clarify when you arrive.
We use your choice to sort the nearest openings first.
When works for you?
You will see exact times on the next screen.
Optional now — we only use it to greet you.
Optional. Provide one if you want a reminder.

By continuing you agree that we may store the details above to manage your booking. We never sell your information.

); } function Contact() { return (

Need a hand?

Real people answer during business hours. We are glad to help in your language.

  • By phone (555) 555-0100 Mon–Fri, 8:00–17:00
  • By email help@civicslot.gov We reply within one business day
  • In person 1 Civic Plaza, Room 120 Open Mon–Fri, 8:00–17:00

If something is not accessible

Tell us what blocked you and we will fix it or find another way to serve you. You can reach our accessibility coordinator at{" "} a11y@civicslot.gov.

); } function Footer() { return (

Civic Slot

A free service of the city and county for residents.

Services Availability Accessibility Contact

Plain language is part of public service. This page avoids marketing claims on purpose.

); } function App() { return ( <>
); } createRoot(document.getElementById("root")!).render();

part.text: Now CSS. Plain, calm public-service palette, visible focus states, responsive.

state.title: npm run build 2>&1

part.text:
Build clean, tsc passes, no errors.

Built static React landing page in `src/main.tsx` + `src/style.css`, title/meta in `index.html`. Semantic landmarks (`header`/`nav`/`main`/`section` w/ aria-labelledby/`aside`/`footer`), skip-link, visible focus rings (3px solid outline on all interactive els), labelled form controls with helper text, plain-language copy (no marketing superlatives), responsive grid collapses at 820/480px, reduced-motion honored.

Verification: `npm run build` (tsc --noEmit + vite build) → pass, no console errors.

Skipped: split components into a `components/` folder, routing, state lib, tests for static markup. Add when page grows past one screen-set or gains real booking fetch.
